articles.author: Piper Hudspeth Blackburn
articles.title: How Trump’s takeover fractured America’s birthday party - CNN
articles.description: When Next250 organizers began planning for America’s 250th birthday, they envisioned bringing together communities in a polarized country to celebrate democracy.
articles.content:
When Next250 organizers began planning for Americas 250th birthday, they envisioned bringing together communities in a polarized country to celebrate democracy.
But then Donald Trump returned to off… [+10105 chars]
